name: Shanghai Huace Navigation Technology Ltd
summary: Shanghai Huace Navigation Technology Ltd. operates as a GNSS positioning technology and products company in China and internationally. The company offers GNSS survey and engineering products, as well as software solutions for high precision surveying and positioning, engineering, mapping, GIS data collection, road stakeout, and pipeline surveying; GIS data collection products; GNSS infrastructures; unmanned aircraft systems; and precision agricultural products for various applications and industries, such as auto-steering, ditching, ridging, seeding, inter-tillage, etc. It also provides rugged total stations for optical surveying; and vehicle-independent mobile mapping solutions, as well as products for marine construction industry. Shanghai Huace Navigation Technology Ltd. has a strategic collaboration agreement with CMMB Silkwave Limited to jointly develop the BeiDou navigation applications and services. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
